corrections: replace the v5 boundary-subset fitted-surface gate with the accepted aggregate January transition statistic
combine within-block January numerators and denominators with realized Dec 31 to Jan 1 path pairs at both horizons
retain boundary-only January ratios as diagnostics and retain the separately registered directional boundary and spell-continuation guard
fail closed only if a combined conditioning denominator is zero; a zero boundary-only denominator is diagnostically unavailable rather than a failure
invalidated_outcome: V5 was stopped after 65 of 306 path records when bounded scientific review identified an uncalibrated boundary-subset constraint that could create a false hold. No aggregate or decision was issued.
review_authority: bounded independent scientific-validity and accuracy/numerical design rechecks
